abort.no_installations: No Verisure installations were found for this account.

error.mfa_rate_limited: Verisure temporarily rate limited authentication. Please try again later.
error.unknown_mfa: Unknown error occurred during MFA setup

installation.description: Home Assistant found multiple Verisure installations in your My Pages account. Please, select the installation to add to Home Assistant.

mfa.description: Your account has 2-step verification enabled. Enter the verification code Verisure sends to you.

reauth_mfa.description: Enter the verification code Verisure sends to you.

user.description: Sign in with your Verisure email and password. DNI/NIE is not required.

data.lock_code_digits: Number of digits in PIN code for locks

data_description.scan_interval: How often all Verisure data, including intrusion events, is fetched. Allowed range: 10 to 3600 seconds. Short intervals increase API traffic.

capture_smartcam.description: Captures a new image from a Verisure SmartCam.
capture_smartcam.name: Capture SmartCam image

disable_autolock.description: Disables autolock of a Verisure Lockguard Smartlock.
disable_autolock.name: Disable autolock

enable_autolock.description: Enables autolock of a Verisure Lockguard Smartlock.
enable_autolock.name: Enable autolock
